docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF NARANTSETSEG SUVDAA IS PRESENT.
